title: dioon edule var. sonorense
intro: Dioon edule var. sonorense, also known as the Sonoran dioon or Mexican cycad, is a type of plant belonging to the cycad family, characterized by its evergreen, fern-like leaves and cone-like reproductive structures. Traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its ability to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its seeds are used to make a medicinal oil, which is applied topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
